title: License Fee / Rent
text: The Licensee/Tenant shall pay to the Licensor/Landlord a monthly license fee/rent of INR {{license_fee}}{{rent_amount}} payable on or before the fifth (5th) day of each calendar month. Payment shall be made by bank transfer (NEFT/RTGS/UPI) or such other mode as agreed in writing. The Licensor/Landlord shall issue a written receipt for each payment. In the event of non-payment within fifteen (15) days of the due date, simple interest at fifteen percent (15%) per annum shall accrue on the overdue amount. The Parties agree that timely payment of the license fee/rent is of the essence of this Agreement.
statutory_reference: Transfer of Property Act, 1882 – S.105; Model Tenancy Act, 2021
